name: Qatar Industrial Manufacturing Company Q.P.S.C.
summary: Qatar Industrial Manufacturing Company Q.P.S.C., together with its subsidiaries, engages in industrial manufacturing and various types of industrial investments in Qatar and internationally. The company produces treated sand for construction and agricultural uses; paving stones and kerb stones; facial tissues, toilet rolls, kitchen rolls, and M Tork rolls; sulphuric acid for local and export markets; and non-colored and colored aluminum profiles. It serves petrochemicals, chemicals and building materials, and food industries. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Doha, Qatar.
